title: theme — Eloquent observers
description: Three observers — one per aggregate. Each enforces its aggregate's invariants: freeze tokens_snapshot on activate, refuse cross-tenant preset use, validate vocabulary at write time, dispatch RegenerateRenderedCssJob after commit.

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `thm_` + resolve created_by from Sanctum
creating → refuse without `theme_capture` entitlement (EntitlementGate::isFeatureEntitled)

creating → refuse when selected_preset.tenant_id != tenant.id AND selected_preset.tenant_id != null (defense-in-depth against cross-tenant preset use — the query builder already scopes but observer covers direct writes)
creating → validate mode against valid_mode rule
creating → validate accessibility_flags jsonb shape against valid_accessibility_flags_shape rule
creating → tokens_snapshot starts null; frozen only on first activate
updating (is_active false → true) → resolve cascade: platform_default_preset ← selected_preset ← theme_token_overrides → materialise into tokens_snapshot jsonb + set activated_at = now()

updating (is_active false → true) → find prior active theme in same (tenant_id, mode) WHERE is_active = true; flip to is_active = false + set deactivated_at (same DB txn — enforces unique_active_theme_per_tenant_per_mode)
updating (is_active true → false) → set deactivated_at; keep tokens_snapshot for rollback
updated (is_active true → true, accessibility_flags changed) → per changed flag, fire ThemeAccessibilityFlagChanged event
updated (post-commit, is_active true) → dispatch RegenerateRenderedCssJob for this tenant
deleting → refuse when is_active = true (must deactivate before delete)
creating → populate ULID prefix `tps_` + resolve created_by_user_id from Sanctum
creating (tenant_id != null) → refuse without `theme_custom_presets` entitlement
creating (tenant_id != null) → count existing tenant custom presets against the entitlement cap (theme_custom_presets); refuse when exceeded
creating (tenant_id = null) → refuse unless guard is platform_admin (platform preset creation is Stackra-staff-only)
creating → validate tokens jsonb against canonical vocabulary (PresetValidator via valid_token_key + valid_token_value_for_type rules)
creating → validate slug matches ^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]{0,63}$
creating → validate category against ThemePresetCategory enum
creating → validate mode against valid_mode rule
creating → for tenant custom: verify slug does not collide within tenant namespace (COALESCE(tenant_id, 'platform'), slug) unique partial index
updating (is_active false → true) → fire ThemePresetPublished event
updating (tokens changed) → re-run PresetValidator; refuse on invalid
updating (tokens changed, is_active = true, referenced by any Theme.selected_preset_id) → dispatch MigrateThemeTokensOnPresetUpdateJob for downstream themes
deleting (tenant_id = null) → refuse unless guard is platform_admin
deleting → refuse when Theme.selected_preset_id = this.id AND Theme.is_active = true (active themes hold a reference)
creating → populate ULID prefix `tto_` + resolve created_by from Sanctum
creating → refuse without `theme_token_overrides` entitlement
creating → count existing overrides for this theme against theme_token_overrides entitlement cap; refuse when exceeded
creating → validate token_key matches canonical vocabulary via valid_token_key rule (data/token-vocabulary.json)
creating → validate token_type against ThemeTokenType enum

creating → validate token_value against token_type schema (valid_token_value_for_type — color = hex/rgb/hsl/oklch, dimension = px/rem/em/%, opacity = 0..1, z_index = integer, motion.duration = ms/s, etc.)
creating → validate uniqueness (tenant_id, theme_id, token_key) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
creating → refuse when parent Theme.tenant_id != tenant.id (defense-in-depth cross-tenant guard)
created (post-commit) → dispatch RegenerateRenderedCssJob for parent theme; fire ThemeTokenOverridden event
updated (token_value changed) → dispatch RegenerateRenderedCssJob for parent theme; fire ThemeTokenOverridden event
deleted → dispatch RegenerateRenderedCssJob for parent theme; fire ThemeTokenOverrideRemoved event
